title: Map CKC/PoseKit original intent to current Handshake Atelier native surfaces
operator_request: Process the operator's CKC/PoseKit history and current Handshake Atelier intent before visual and behavioral overhaul work.

scope.base_scope: Read-only parity and intent audit covering the current Handshake native Atelier/CKC/PoseKit implementation, the original CastKit Codex and PoseKit app evidence, the Facial image sorting app, and the Leeseo Handshake prompt feedback wishlist.
in_scope: Confirm whether current Handshake exposes CKC as a top-level control or under an Atelier shell.

Recover original CKC feature intent: character/avatar database, editable sheets, linked images/folders, albums, search, tags, image notes, sheet notes, story panels, moodboards, image ingest, LoRA mining review states, and contact sheets.

Recover original PoseKit/OpenRepose feature intent: split 3D/OpenPose view, 360 rotation, marker toggles, facial marker editing, export-ready OpenPose, zoom/framing control, body marker removal, and future pose sculpting.
Map Facial app capabilities to a future Handshake-native image ingest pipeline only where they support CKC/LoRA mining workflows.
Extract Leeseo handoff and wishlist items that affect Handshake Atelier, CKC, PoseKit, prompt feedback, or model-facing workflows.
non_goals: Do not implement UI changes in this MT.
Do not rewrite CKC, PoseKit, Facial, or Leeseo files in this MT.
Do not disturb ../wtc-native-editors-v1 or the active WP-KERNEL-012 GUI rebuild.
Do not expand future Rust native Affinity, Photoshop, Marvelous Designer, or full 3D avatar creation into this MT.

expected_behavior: Produce a machine-readable parity and intent map that a no-context model can use to select the next CKC/PoseKit overhaul microtasks.
Separate proven/current Handshake implementation facts from operator intent, original app evidence, and future non-goals.
Identify the smallest useful next implementation MT without changing product code.

parallel_agent_plan.scope: Inspect current native Atelier/CKC/PoseKit UI, backend, tests, and manual anchors in the CKC hotfix worktree.
Inspect original CastKit Codex source and governance for CKC/PoseKit feature intent and parity evidence.
Inspect Facial product/spec for image sorting and LoRA mining ingest capabilities relevant to future Handshake native tools.
Inspect Leeseo Handshake prompt feedback handoff and wishlist for CKC/PoseKit/Atelier-relevant requests.

acceptance_criteria: Current Handshake native Atelier/CKC/PoseKit surfaces are cited by file path and line or symbol where practical.
Original CKC/PoseKit behavior is broken into feature groups with source evidence and unknowns.
Facial and Leeseo findings are triaged as direct CKC/PoseKit relevance, adjacent ingest relevance, or out-of-scope future work.
Next MT recommendation is specific enough to implement without re-reading this conversation.
risk_notes: The user provided broad future tool intent; this MT must not convert future Rust rebuilds into current CKC/PoseKit scope.
The active GUI rebuild WP owns nearby native shell files; this MT must avoid product edits and avoid committing unrelated WP-KERNEL-012 governance dirt.
Original CKC and Facial apps may contain implementation details that are useful references but not acceptable as direct Handshake architecture.

closeout.summary: Produced a machine-readable CKC/PoseKit parity map that separates current Handshake native facts, original CKC/PoseKit parity evidence, Facial ingest reuse, Leeseo prompt-feedback adjacency, and a recommended MT queue. The recommended next microtask is MT-004: visible Atelier/CKC label inversion while preserving internal CKC IDs and /atelier routes.
